scripts.build: command -v idf.py >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py build || echo 'Skipping ESP32 build (ESP-IDF not found)'
scripts.build:all: idf.py build && mkdir -p dist && esptool.py --chip esp32 merge_bin --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 40m --flash_size 4MB -o dist/esp32-client.bin 0x1000 build/bootloader/bootloader.bin 0x8000 build/partition_table/partition-table.bin 0x10000 build/iotkit-client.bin
scripts.publish: pnpm build:all && wrangler r2 object put devicesdk-firmwares/esp32-client.bin --file dist/esp32-client.bin --remote
scripts.test: command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1 && pytest test_*.py -v || echo 'Skipping ESP32 tests'
